trivia_bullets.text: Only printing; from War of the Spark (WAR, May 2019), set on Ravnica during Nicol Bolas's planar invasion. The set included colorless constructs and golems at the common slot as incidental war-machines deployed throughout Ravnica during the conflict. Iron Bully is among these.

"Why would someone have built ... wait, never mind. Send it to the front lines!" — Commander Grozdan. Grozdan is not a named lore character elsewhere in WAR materials; the name appears unique to this card's flavor. The flavor's structure — a question abandoned mid-sentence — literalizes deployment logic: manufacture precedes authorization.

Menace plus an enter-the-battlefield +1/+1 counter on any target creature. EDHREC rank 19,866 — low Commander presence. Legal in Pauper, Paupercommander, Pioneer, Modern, Historic, Legacy, Commander. Marginal synergy piece in counter-matters and sacrifice strategies; generally assessed as common filler.
Illustrated by Aaron Miller, who has illustrated a wide range of MTG creatures across multiple sets. No specific design notes on this card have been found.
